name: Jackie Walorski
tweet: This legislation takes important steps to prevent future boondoggles, restore accountability, and modernize the IRS’s outdated IT systems.

name: Jackie Walorski
tweet: That’s why I introduced H.R. 5362, the IRS Information Technology Accountability Act, and I’m thankful it was included in the 21st Century IRS Act.

name: Jackie Walorski
tweet: More money can’t fix failed leadership or a broken culture at the IRS. Better guidelines, codified roles, and more intentional strategic planning can.

name: Jackie Walorski
tweet: Unforced errors are turning vital projects into boondoggles. The IRS isn’t even asking the most basic questions before spending millions on software.

name: Jackie Walorski
tweet: Some of the IRS’s IT systems date back to the Kennedy administration, but repeated mistakes big and small undermine our trust in the IRS to fix them.

name: Jackie Walorski
tweet: There’s a trust gap between taxpayers and the IRS, and the IRS’s information technology systems are a good example of why.

name: Jackie Walorski
tweet: 2 of 2: that help feed Hoosiers in my district & provide support to families & children in need.

tweet: 1 of 2: While I recognize the gov't role in this process, there are local orgs like St. Margaret's House & the Food Bank of northern IN...

name: Jackie Walorski
tweet: 2 of 2: and specifically its recipients and find unmet needs and areas of overlap.

tweet: 1 of 2: It is my hope & expectation that this sbcmte will explore & gain a better understanding of the entire program...
